summary: Frontend testing of Paint Shop visual configurator. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Color bleed occurs on some truck models (Compact Transit Van, others) where the entire canvas background gets colored instead of just the truck body. Classic Step Van works correctly. The issue is that some truck images have TRANSPARENT backgrounds instead of BLACK backgrounds, causing the mix-blend-mode: multiply technique to fail.

ui_bugs.issue: COLOR BLEED: Color overlay bleeds into entire canvas background on some truck models (Compact Transit Van, etc.). The mix-blend-mode: multiply technique requires BLACK background images, but some truck images have TRANSPARENT backgrounds.

action_items: CRITICAL: Replace truck images with WHITE truck on BLACK background versions for ALL 6 models
Alternative: Use CSS mask-image or clip-path to constrain color overlay to truck silhouette only
Verify all 6 truck model images have consistent BLACK backgrounds (not transparent)
critical_code_review_comments: TruckCanvas implementation (lines 289-380) uses correct mix-blend-mode: multiply technique
The code assumes truck images are 'white truck on black background' but some images have transparent backgrounds
Layer structure is correct: black base -> truck image -> color overlay with multiply blend
The issue is with the IMAGE ASSETS, not the code logic

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Most features work, but critical color bleed bug on some truck models

context_for_next_testing_agent: Color bleed bug confirmed on Compact Transit Van and possibly other models. Classic Step Van works correctly. The root cause is inconsistent truck image backgrounds - some have transparent backgrounds instead of black.

Paint_Shop_Loads.details: Paint Shop loads correctly with truck preview

Color_Selection.details: Color selection works but causes color bleed on some truck models

Color_Bleed_Test.details: CRITICAL: Color bleeds into entire canvas background on Compact Transit Van. Classic Step Van works correctly.
Color_Bleed_Test.root_cause: Truck images have inconsistent backgrounds - some transparent, some black. mix-blend-mode: multiply requires black backgrounds.

Truck_Model_Selection.details: All 6 truck models can be selected and display

Color_Palettes.details: All 7 palettes (Classic Fleet, Copper & Steel, Street Food, Coastal, Luxury, Neon City, Custom) work

Custom_Color_Picker.details: Custom hex color input and color picker work correctly

Two_Tone_Paint.details: Toggle enables secondary color and split patterns

Finish_Types.details: All 7 finishes (Matte, Gloss, Metallic, Chrome, Enamel, Satin, Pearl) selectable

Wraps_Tab.details: Wrap patterns can be selected with opacity control

Text_Tab.details: Business name appears on truck preview with font/color/size options

Extras_Tab.details: Awning, LED Underglow, Roof Signage, Racing Stripe toggles work

Save_Design.details: Save button works, shows 'Design saved successfully!' toast

Page_Background_Integrity.details: Page background (dark theme) is NOT affected by color selection - only the truck canvas area

technical_analysis.implementation: TruckCanvas uses isolation context with layers: 1) Black base, 2) Truck image, 3) Color overlay with mix-blend-mode: multiply
technical_analysis.expected_behavior: multiply(color, black) = black (background stays dark), multiply(color, white) = color (truck gets painted)
technical_analysis.actual_behavior_classic_step_van: Works correctly - truck body colored, background black
technical_analysis.actual_behavior_compact_transit_van: Color bleeds into entire canvas - background becomes colored
technical_analysis.root_cause: Compact Transit Van image has TRANSPARENT background instead of BLACK. When color overlay is applied with multiply blend, transparent areas show the color.

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/final_test_2.png - Compact Transit Van with color (COLOR BLEED)
